Bearer.name: Authorization
Bearer.description: ⚠️ Enter: Bearer <your_token>  (include the word Bearer and a space)

post.description: Creates a prescription with explicit doctor assignment.

200.description: Available slots for the given date.

post.description: Creates a prescription for a completed appointment.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Qeyri-aktiv istifadəçilər: inactive, aktiv istifadəçilər: active, leader: lider istifadəçilər

200.description: If query param `search` is provided: doctor-only patient search (simple result for doctors, full result for staff/admin), same `data` + `meta` pagination shape as the general list. Empty `search` returns an empty page. Otherwise: paginated user list.

post.description:
Takes a set of user credentials and returns an access and refresh JSON web
token pair to prove the authentication of those credentials.

Takes a token and blacklists it. Must be used with the
`rest_framework_simplejwt.token_blacklist` app installed.

Takes a refresh type JSON web token and returns an access type JSON web
token if the refresh token is valid.

200.description: Authenticated profile. The data shape depends on role.

parameters.name: files[]
parameters.description: One or more files (repeat the key for multiple files).

is_superuser.title: Superuser status
is_superuser.description: Designates that this user has all permissions without explicitly assigning them.

username.title: Username
username.description: Required. 150 characters or fewer. Letters, digits and @/./+/-/_ only.

is_staff.title: Staff status
is_staff.description: Designates whether the user can log into this admin site.

is_active.title: Active
is_active.description: Designates whether this user should be treated as active. Unselect this instead of deleting accounts.

groups.description: The groups this user belongs to. A user will get all permissions granted to each of their groups.

items.description: The groups this user belongs to. A user will get all permissions granted to each of their groups.
